title: dondia occidentalis
intro: Dondia occidentalis, also known as West Indian Jasmine or Dondia, is a flowering plant native to the Caribbean and Central America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce pain. The health benefits of Dondia occidentalis include its ability to promote digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Dondia occidentalis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for a range of applications in traditional medicine.
